---
title: "\'Conversation on the Girls\' Friendly Society, A\' By the Editor"
---

## \'Conversation on the Girls\' Friendly Society, A\' By the Editor

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (September 1882) 254-261

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
